proposed_domain: Stinging nettle trichome one-shot multi-compound payload

closest_prior_match.verdict: ADJACENT — bombardier mixes 2 reactants on demand; nettle releases pre-mixed cocktail. Same family (one-shot defense), different sub-mechanism.

decision: ACCEPT_with_adjacency — sufficiently distinct from R292 by being PRE-MIXED rather than two-chamber catalysis.
